title: TaskRequest
description: The standard request payload for initiating a text-to-text execution task within the IndeRun framework.

schemaVersion.description: Contract schema version used to interpret the request payload.

requestId.description: Optional identifier for tracking or correlating this specific execution attempt.

task.description: A descriptor specifying the type of work to be performed. For text-to-text, the kind must be 'text_to_text'.

kind.description: The standard task category. Currently supports 'text_to_text' for prompt-based interactions.

prompt.description: A simple, single-turn text prompt used to trigger a response from the AI model.

messages.description: A list of interaction messages for multi-turn conversation or chat-style execution.

items.description: An individual message in a conversation.

content.description: The actual text content of the message.

generation.description: Optional configuration for fine-tuning how the AI model generates its response.

maxOutputTokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in a single response.

temperature.description: Controls the randomness of the output. Range: 0 (most deterministic) to 2 (highest variance).

topP.description: Nucleus sampling parameter for controlling diversity vs focus in the output.

seed.description: A fixed seed for deterministic generation (where supported by the underlying provider).

stop.description: Sequence tokens that should terminate the generation process.

constraints.description: Request-level routing constraints used by the planner.

privacy.description: Privacy requirement or preference for execution placement.

timeoutMs.description: Optional routing timeout budget in milliseconds.

preferences.description: Soft routing preferences used for deterministic provider ordering.

optimizeFor.description: Primary optimization goal when multiple providers remain eligible.

telemetry.description: Execution preferences for tracking usage and performance metrics.

consent.description: Whether the user consents to telemetry collection for this specific request.

level.description: The granularity of the collected metrics (off, minimal, or debug).

tags.description: Optional key-value pairs for correlating telemetry data with specific features or users.

authContextRef.description: A unique identifier used to retrieve credentials from a secure local storage. Raw sensitive keys (API keys, etc.) should NEVER be placed directly in the request payload.
